title: Gyecko's Archeology
description: Prehistoric Mobs, Ancient Tools, Fossil Statues and much more!!
body:
![Lettering](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/426f88491f68e74a76f7508a0c251ea5b0a4dff3.png)
  ##  **Prehistoric Mobs, Ancient Tools, Fossil Statues and much more!!**
[_GeckoLib dependent_](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)





###   Be a fossil assembler with the **ARCHAEOLOGIST'S TABLE**!
![ARCHAEOLOGIST'S TABLE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9be47c647a5c864100645ef99a3a70d821a622a6.png)



[**The ancient animals**](https://gyeckosarcheology.fandom.com/wiki/Mobs)

- Dodo!
- Baby Dodo!
- Anomalocaris!
- Coelacanth!
- Tegu Lizard!
- Elasmotherium!
- Gharial!
- Tupandactylus!
- Ornimegalonyx!
- TerrorBird!
- Sacabambaspis!
- Sibertooth Tiger!
- Daeodon!
- Ichyosaurus!
- Megaloceros!
- Sawfish!
- Deinonychus!
- Baby Deinonychus!


**Fossil statues:**

- Dodo fossil statue!
- Elasmotherium fossil statue!
- Coelacanth fossil frame!
